[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 01001111 5
4 01011001 4
5 11101000 4
6 10101101 5
7 11111010 6

01 10 01011111 6
12 21 11111001 6
23 32 11101101 6
34 43 11111111 a
45 54 11111111 a
56 65 11111111 a
67 76 10011110 5
70 07 01001111 5 match 3

13 31 11111101 7
24 42 11111010 6 match 7
35 53 11111101 7
46 64 11111010 6 match 7

37 73 10101111 6
